terms.SBR: Small Business Restructuring — a formal restructuring process under Part 5.3B of the Corporations Act 2001
terms.ROCAP: Report on Company Activities and Property — statutory form lodged with ASIC
terms.DIRRI: Declaration of Independence, Relevant Relationships and Indemnities
terms.RATA: Remuneration Approval by Time and Activity — basis for practitioner fee approval
terms.preferential_payment: A payment made to a creditor within 6 months before the relation-back day that gives the creditor more than they would receive in a winding up
terms.relation_back_day: The date from which certain pre-appointment transactions may be voidable — typically the date the restructuring practitioner is appointed
terms.dividend: The amount payable to creditors from funds available for distribution, expressed as cents in the dollar
terms.proof_of_debt: A formal claim lodged by a creditor setting out the amount owed and the basis of the debt
terms.secured_creditor: A creditor who holds a security interest (such as a PPSR registration) over company property
terms.unsecured_creditor: A creditor without a security interest — ranks behind secured creditors and employee entitlements
terms.related_party: A person or entity connected to the company as defined in s 9 of the Corporations Act — includes directors, their relatives, and entities they control
terms.deed_of_company_arrangement: DOCA — a binding arrangement between a company and its creditors as an alternative to liquidation
terms.insolvent_trading: Trading while unable to pay debts as and when they fall due — potential personal liability for directors under s 588G
terms.safe_harbour: Protection from insolvent trading liability under s 588GA where directors pursue a course of action reasonably likely to lead to a better outcome
terms.company_offer_statement: The document prepared by the restructuring practitioner setting out the proposed restructuring plan for creditors to vote on
terms.voting_period: The 15 business day period during which creditors may vote to accept or reject the restructuring plan
terms.restructuring_practitioner: RP — the registered liquidator appointed to oversee the SBR process
